name: Roasted Fillet of Beef with Rosemary Au Jus
recipeIngredient: Whole fillet, surface cleaned and trimmed of excess fat and silver skin
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the beef fillet by removing any excess fat and trimming the silver skin.
2. In a bowl, whisk together 1 cup of soy sauce, 1/2 cup of balsamic vinegar, 4 tablespoons of Worcestershire sauce, 4 tablespoons of A-1 sauce, and 5 tablespoons of sherry until well combined.
3. Add 6 cloves of minced garlic and freshly ground pepper to the mixture, stirring to incorporate.
4. Pat the beef fillet dry with paper towels.
5. Place the seasoned beef in a shallow dish or wrap it securely in plastic wrap.
6. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or ideally overnight, to allow the flavors to penetrate the meat.
7. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
8. Remove the beef from the refrigerator and let it come to room temperature before roasting.
9. Place the seasoned beef on a rack in a roasting pan.
10. Roast in the preheated oven for about 20-25 minutes per side, depending on desired doneness.
11. Let the beef rest for 5-10 minutes before slicing and serving.
